title: Eco Attire
description: Enhance your Minecraft experience with biome-specific mob clothing, blending seamlessly into each unique environment.
body: ## ![Eco Attire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cd9e25e196dff1038cae5133e9480a5fbc4be19.png) ## Eco Attire brings a fresh look to your Minecraft mobs by adapting the biome-specific clothing of Villagers to Pillagers, Vindicators, Skeletons, and Zombies. Explore a world where mobs blend seamlessly into their environments with unique outfits for each biome. ## ![Features:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb3066398d26ff4e562aafe3a04a46d9752dbd9d.png) **Biome-Specific Attire:** Villagers, Pillagers, Vindicators, Skeletons, and Zombies wear unique outfits that adapt to their biome. ## ![Attire:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a4ea5a12f6bf28619296f877aa5a35baa215217.png) **Pillagers:** ![Pillager Attire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c12e51c2406decd1a9f62205be19183ef453fff6.png) **Vindicators:** ![Vindicator Attire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ffb9e47d6babc0f5398bf94dc049203da3ea1f4.png) **Zombies:** ![Zombie Attire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/168c801d03d3cdc51729e40dc2ebd7430a8c2f22.png) **Skeletons:** ![Skeleton Attire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79e764236bbe67b344ee24ee5d121871a14c2787.png) ## ![Compatibility:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16dae431e57ffcead795ab855b5c5f6517157d75.png) Eco Attire supports all versions starting from 1.17, ensuring a seamless experience across various versions. Please note that you will need to use [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to ensure compatibility. ## ![Installation:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa6863a1f013cf65ae818cdf03995a85a87860bb.png) To install Eco Attire, simply download the appropriate version for your game and place it in your resource pack folder. ## ![Additional Links:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0087c26aab97d26c8115f39e18801be73b0ee487.png)
